description: A warm, perceptive plush barn owl who brings calm curiosity, careful thinking, and teacherly clarity to every task.

pet_notes: Compact full-body plush barn owl mascot; warm parchment cream and cocoa brown feathers; subtle muted teal accent stitching; oversized attentive amber eyes; heart-shaped facial disk; short wings and sturdy little feet; calm scholarly warmth, precise and curious, friendly without being childish; no clothing, no held prop, no text or symbols.
style_notes: Polished handcrafted plush character, soft but crisp large-scale shapes, minimal seams, readable at 192x208, symmetric identity suitable for safe left-right mirroring.
style_contract: Pet-safe sprite: compact full-body mascot, readable in a 192x208 cell, clear silhouette, simple face, stable palette/materials, and crisp edges for chroma-key extraction. Style `plush`: Soft plush toy mascot with rounded stitched forms, fuzzy fabric feel, simple sewn details, and readable toy-like proportions. User style notes: Polished handcrafted plush character, soft but crisp large-scale shapes, minimal seams, readable at 192x208, symmetric identity suitable for safe left-right mirroring..
pet_safe_style: Pet-safe sprite: compact full-body mascot, readable in a 192x208 cell, clear silhouette, simple face, stable palette/materials, and crisp edges for chroma-key extraction.
